content.rendered:
It is a role that continuously improves the UI/UX of its own product "PsychSafe Score" while cooperating with PdM engineers. Full remote operation is possible, and operation can be consulted from about 20 hours a week. It is an environment where deeper research and design system development can be undertaken at the timing of entering the stable operation phase as a product.

How we work

Functional improvements will be made on a sprint-by-sprint basis for two weeks. You can get involved from the design of user research centered on Figma. We expect a wide range of roles, including not only design, but also user interviews, data analysis, and hypothesis testing.

Product Features

PsychSafe Score is an organization survey tool in the B2B SaaS area. End users are multi-layered with management, managers, and site members, and each requires a different experience design. There are advanced hands-on opportunities for designing to “make the data look right” and “inspire action”.

You're welcome to:

Those who want to be involved in the long-term growth of products, are interested in the design and operation of design systems, and want to do research and design all at once.

acf.salary_range: 300,000 to 800,000 yen per month (depending on operating time and experience)
acf.required_skills:
3 + years of experience in UI/UX design for SaaS products
Work experience using Figma (including component design and library operation)
Experience operating design systems in collaboration with engineers
Experience spinning the hypothesis→ validation cycle (research→ design validation)
Japanese Native
acf.preferred_skills:
UX design experience in B2B SaaS
Experience in design research (interview design/analysis)
Accessibility (WCAG) compliance findings
Animation design (Motion/Framer, etc.)
Communication in English (with collaboration with overseas members)
acf.benefits:
Fully remote (optional office visit)
Flexible uptime settings (20-40 hours per week)
Tool cost subsidy (Figma/Notion, etc., up to 10,000 yen per month)
Device purchase assistance required for work (up to 100,000 yen per year)
In-house study group/external conference participation fee subsidy
Book Purchase Assistance
Subsidy for participation in the online design community
Salary increases are reviewed twice a year on recurring contracts

content.rendered:
You will be involved as a lead consultant in an organizational transformation project for a client company. I am in charge of dialogue with management, on-site interviews, diagnosis, suggestions, and retention support. Basically, I am in charge of 2 to 3 escort projects for 3 to 6 months per project at the same time.

Job Features

It is not a one-off proposal/delivery, but a role to support organizational change through long-term parallel running. Engage continuously until the proposal is working in the field, not at the end of the proposal. For those who felt unsatisfactory in consulting "design only" and "analysis only", it is an environment with a lot of intellectual and practical stimulation.

We're looking for

Those who have practical experience in the field of organizational development and human resources and are familiar with both quantitative and qualitative approaches. We especially welcome those who can sympathize with the Nordic organizational view. In his previous position, he was active in a variety of backgrounds, including consulting firms, organizational development and human resources of operating companies, and HR technology companies.

Ways of working

Working 3 days a week remotely, 2 days a week in the Tokyo office or at a client location. There is also a system of short-term work at overseas bases (Stockholm) (once a year for up to two weeks).

acf.salary_range: 7,000,000 to 12,000,000 yen (subject to consultation depending on experience)
acf.required_skills:
5 + years of experience in organizational development/HR
Interaction experience with management and managers (assuming experience in multiple companies)
Fundamental skills to work with quantitative data (either Excel/SQL)
Japanese Native or Business Level
Multi-project parallel management experience
acf.preferred_skills:
Experience working in a consulting firm
Business communication in English or Scandinavian languages
Management experience in own product development organization
Academic background in organizational and industrial psychology
Experience working in the B2B SaaS industry
International project experience
acf.benefits:
Full 2 days off per week (Saturdays, Sundays and public holidays)/6 days recharge leave in another year apart from paid leave
Remote work allowance 20,000 yen per month
Book purchase/conference participation fee fully covered by the company (with annual limit)
Stockholm office short-term stay (once a year for up to two weeks)
Childcare leave: Achieved for one year regardless of gender, and can work shorter hours even after returning
Encouragement to participate in internal study sessions and external training (during business hours)
Office: Ebisu, Tokyo (3-minute walk from the station)
Sideline work is allowed (pre-application system, only confirmation of avoidance of competition)
